variants: Tiberiu Gherman was raised in Mulleinbrook Gate and completed his education at the Amberglade Technical Institute, cultivating his skills in design. He has since moved to Portvale Estates, where he works at Sundew Design Agency, contributing significantly to various projects. His innovative approach to design earned him the Flareborn Virtue Emblem, highlighting his talent and dedication in the field. As a team member at Sundew Design Agency, Tiberiu continues to leave a lasting impact in the design community.
